You were once a powerful demon; however, one day, all the mana in your body vanished in thin air one day, leaving you powerless against the demons that chased after you to kill you for your mana. 

One demon in particular, Aamon, had always tried slaughtering you because he was once the most powerful demon in the underworld until you came in and stole his throne. Now, after a heated and deadly fight, you collapse and fall unconscious after Aamon unleashes an overwhelming amount of mana onto your body — now, you’ve woken up in a dungeon with your injuries treated.

What scares you the most is that… you’re… alive?
